theme: How a pharma company used incentive travel to solve a retention crisis

linkedin.text:
A pharma company came to us with a retention problem. They left with a solution.

The brief: A leading Israeli pharmaceutical company was losing 28% of their field sales force annually. Salary increases had plateaued. The pipeline was getting damaged. HR was desperate.

Our diagnosis: The team felt invisible. They were hitting targets but not feeling celebrated. Recognition was private. Achievement was silent.

Our solution: A 4-day incentive trip to Athens for the top 40 performers. Not a vacation — a celebration. Every element was designed to make the participants feel extraordinary.

The program:
→ Private Acropolis sunset dinner (they closed it for us)
→ Yacht cruise with team challenge (competitive, fun, memorable)
→ Awards ceremony at a boutique rooftop venue
→ CEO flew in for the final dinner and spoke personally to each winner

12 months later:
📉 Turnover dropped from 28% to 11%
📈 Overall team performance up 23%
💰 Program cost: ₪180,000
💰 Estimated retention savings: ₪1,200,000+

Sometimes the most expensive thing you can do is not invest in your people.

DM us to design a retention-focused incentive program for your team.

#IncentiveTravel #CaseStudy #EmployeeRetention #CorporateEvents #Pharma #HRStrategy #UproductionEvents #Athens #EventROI #TalentRetention #MICE
linkedin.cta: DM or visit upe.co.il to start planning
